name: ScienceSwarm Brown Bag
description: Stress-test an early research idea into a durable written brief with a sharper research question, decisive test, hard-objection map, publication roadmap, and next research assignment.
summary: A rigorous brown-bag partner for scientists, mathematicians, social scientists, and engineers: turn a rough research idea into a saved Research Brown Bag Brief with premises, objections, alternative framings, a publication pathway, and the smallest decisive next test.
